backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Raj Empire Esports backend, defining data types and state for users, tournaments, registrations, support tickets, OTPs, and social links, with access-controlled query and update methods for managing all entities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three confirmed high-confidence features for RegisterPage.tsx: auto-triggering Internet Identity on step 2, fixing the stuck 'Connecting...' loading state, and redirecting to home after successful registration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all major frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Raj Empire Esports app, loading Google Fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron, Saira Condensed) and mounting the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (public, player-protected, and admin-protected), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, AuthProvider, and AdminAuthProvider, and defines Layout and AdminLayout wrapper components.
frontend/src/components/AdminProtectedRo: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated admin users to /admin using AdminAuthContext and renders children only when isAdminAuthenticated is true.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component that displays the brand logo, quick navigation links via useNavigate, and social media icons (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram) fetched from the backend via useGetSocialLinks.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and conditional auth controls (login/register or player dashboard/logout) based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, Footer, and a flex-column container, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: Modal dialog for joining a tournament by spending coins; checks wallet balance, calls the register mutation, and shows success or error feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the login page and renders children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/context/AdminAuthContext.ts: React context providing admin authentication state persisted in localStorage, with login and logout helpers and legacy compatibility aliases.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: React context managing player session state (mobile, displayName, bgmiPlayerId) persisted in localStorage, with login and logout functions that also clear the React Query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks (useQuery and useMutation) wrapping all backend actor calls for tournaments, registrations, players, wallet, support tickets, and other domain entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Exo 2), sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines light/dark CSS custom properties using oklch colors, and adds custom scrollbar and brand gradient utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with a collapsible sidebar navigation covering tournaments, registrations, players, payment proofs, withdrawals, terms, support tickets, and social links, using numerous query/mutation hooks to manage all backend data.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Two-phase admin login page with hardcoded credentials for each phase; on successful completion of both phases it calls adminLogin() and redirects to the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Player dashboard page with a responsive sidebar for navigating profile, tournaments, wallet, withdrawals, and support tabs, using multiple query hooks to display and manage player-specific data.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing page featuring a hero section with CTA buttons to view tournaments or register, followed by a features grid highlighting daily tournaments, mega events, game modes, and security.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Player login page that authenticates via Internet Identity, fetches the caller's profile from the backend actor, and redirects to the player dashboard or shows an error if no account is found.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Multi-step player registration page (details → Internet Identity auth → success) that auto-triggers II login, handles cancellation/error resets, completes registration via backend mutations, and redirects to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Displays Terms & Conditions fetched from the backend (with a hardcoded fallback), parsing numbered sections and rendering them with alternating colored headings in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx: Lists all BGMI tournaments with search and status filter controls, showing each tournament as a card with a register button that opens a PaymentModal or redirects unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers for persisting values to/from sessionStorage and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand colors (red/orange/dark), Orbitron/Rajdhani/Exo2 fonts, brand gradient and shadow utilities, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot tracking the BGMI registration portal's architecture, existing features, known issues (stuck 'Connecting...' button on Step 2), and three pending fix requests for the registration flow.
